manifest_purpose: Reproducibility seed for architecture_profile.json (PF-6 of MEMIT-COMPAT-PROTO-1). v2.0 (S2.3 finalized) covered Block 1 (Kaggle smoke test), Block 2 (RunPod dry-run), and Block 3 (persistent state + rsync mirror) outputs. v3.0 (S2.5b §4.6 authored) adds Stage 1 prep state from S2.5a + S2.5b: target model commitment, MEMIT repo patch state (P-1/P-2/P-4/P-5), hparams JSON binding, smoke-test verdict reference, globals.yml correction state, and HALT-INCOMPLETE cache_provenance pending successor pre-S2.6 fork-work attempt.

2.15-D2.framework_finding: D.2 FAIL at L2-L6 narrowed window. Class D FULLY ELIMINATED. Hypothesis classes A, B, C, D all eliminated through systematic ablation. Architectural-invariant ceiling confirmed structural to (Llama-3.1-8B × MEMIT × canonical hparams). Routes to T-branch per D-S214D-CLASS-D-PARTIAL-1 / D-S215D2-4 (T.2 alt write engine leading).

2.24.session: 2.24 — T.1-α-MEMIT: MEMIT on Llama-3.2-3B at canonical hparams (scale-generalization test)
2.24.block_c_skip_rationale: Route A: 0/5 dry-run verdict; 15-trial replication would reproduce 0/5 at compute cost, no information gain
2.24.finding: Architectural-invariant ceiling GENERALIZES across Llama-class scale (8B -> 3B). 8th axis; first to vary the MODEL. Seven-axis fingerprint reproduced: compute_z internal objective improved ~40,000x per fact (e.g. guitar 1.4e-08 -> 5.5e-04 over 25 steps) while external P(target) at canonical prompt barely moved (guitar 2.2e-04 -> 7.8e-04); top-1 stayed token 279/813, never target.
2.24.rigor_caveat: Result obtained on LOW-AKD corpus (cfb-v3: 5 clustered athletes, identical template) — a known MEMIT stress condition per arXiv 2502.07322 (MEMIT-Merge key-collision). 0/5 proves ceiling-generalizes-across-scale UNDER low-AKD conditions; does NOT disentangle model-family ceiling from low-AKD-corpus ceiling. High-AKD discriminating experiment (KnowEdit) is the key open successor question (OQ-S224-LIT-1).

model_structure_adaptations.note: Three benign 3B-vs-8B structural adaptations; NOT hparam tuning. Canonical hparams otherwise verbatim from hparams/MEMIT/Llama-3.1-8B.json.

model_structure_adaptations.cov_caches: recomputed fresh for 3B (8B caches keyed on 8B architecture; useless for 3B)
